aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing structured data and insufficient conversational content. While reviews and NAP consistency are strong, the lack of schema markup and conversational content limits AI visibility.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema for existing FAQ content

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for maintenance guides
Missing Product schema for HVAC products

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of schema markup prevents AI from identifying key business information.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Kent, WA' where AI struggles to find detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that showcases expertise, such as detailed HVAC maintenance guides and energy efficiency tips.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business visible to the next generation of search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup, causing AI assistants to overlook your services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models cite your business as a top choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Kent
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
